label: distribution_property_error
ambiguity_note: Distributed 2 to x but not to 3. Clear fingerprint in the first step (2x + 3 instead of 2x + 6). High confidence.

label: negative_sign_error
ambiguity_note: Dropped the negative on the 2x term when moving it. Correct arithmetic otherwise. High confidence.

label: equality_balance_error
ambiguity_note: Subtracted 7 from the left side only, not the right. Variables-on-both-sides case. Fingerprint visible in step 2. High confidence.

label: variable_error
ambiguity_note: Conjoined 2 + 3x into 5x (combining unlike terms). Classic closure error. High confidence.

label: operation_inverse_error
ambiguity_note: Divided by 4 instead of multiplying by 4 (wrong inverse operation). High confidence.

label: arithmetic_slip
ambiguity_note: Distributed correctly and used the right inverse operations. Only error is 6 + 8 = 13 instead of 14. Pure computation slip. High confidence.

label: distribution_property_error
ambiguity_note: Distributed 3 to 2x but not to -1. Second distribution example with a coefficient on x. High confidence.

label: negative_sign_error
ambiguity_note: Reached 3x = -6 correctly but reported x = 2, dropping the negative in the final answer. Sign error is the stronger single label; not an abstain case.

label: abstain
ambiguity_note: No work shown. x = 9 implies 3x = 27, which follows from adding 6 instead of subtracting when isolating. Classifiable as balance or sign error; with no steps visible, neither label is clearly stronger.

label: abstain
ambiguity_note: One step collapses 3(x + 2) = 21 directly to 5x = 21. Fits misapplied distributive property or conjoining 3 and 2 into one coefficient; neither is clearly stronger.

label: variable_error
ambiguity_note: Combined 5x + 2x = 7x instead of subtracting (5x - 2x = 3x). Combining unlike-sided terms with the wrong sign. Fingerprint in step 2. Note the final reported answer does not even match their own work, a secondary inconsistency. Confidence medium-high on variable_error.

label: distribution_property_error
ambiguity_note: Failed to distribute 4 to the +1 (wrote 4x + 1 instead of 4x + 4). The balance steps after that are fine. Primary error is distribution. Final answer also inconsistent with shown work. Confidence medium-high.
